overview: Enable a rich chat interface in the console for interactive PRD generation and loop clarification. This replaces or supplements the line-based terminal with a WebSocket-driven chat bubble UI, allowing users to converse with the agent during interactive phases.
goals: Implement a WebSocket endpoint in smith-api for real-time bidirectional chat
Add a Chat UI component to the pod detail view with support for chat bubbles
Integrate the chat with the smith-replica interactive PRD generation phase
Ensure the chat is authenticated and auditable
nonGoals: Replacing the system-level journal (chat messages should also be journaled)
Full-screen immersive chat mode (should fit within pod detail view)
Support for voice or image-based interaction
successMetrics: WebSocket connection establishes within 1 second of opening the chat tab
Messages are delivered and rendered with less than 200ms latency (excluding LLM processing time)
100% of chat messages are persisted as journal entries for traceability
Unauthorized WebSocket upgrade attempts are rejected with 401/403
openQuestions: Should the chat history be stored separately or just derived from the journal?
How do we handle multiple concurrent operators in the same chat?
Should we use a specific chat agent CLI command or just wrap the existing smith --prompt?

routes.name: WebSocket Chat Endpoint
routes.purpose: Upgrade connection to WebSocket for real-time chat interaction

uiNotes: Add a 'Chat' tab or toggle in the pod detail view.
Render user messages on the right, agent messages on the left.
Include a 'thinking' indicator while the agent is processing.
Auto-scroll to the bottom on new messages.

stories.title: Implement WebSocket endpoint in smith-api
stories.description: Add a new route /v1/loops/{id}/control/chat that upgrades to WebSocket and handles bidirectional message flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Messages sent from client are echoed or logged correctly.

stories.title: Add Chat UI to console pod detail
stories.description: Implement the chat interface in console/index.html including message rendering and input handling.
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Chat' toggle or button is added to the pod detail view.
A chat panel appears when enabled, separate from the raw journal terminal.
User can type and send messages via WebSocket.
Messages from the server are rendered as chat bubbles.

stories.title: Integrate chat with interactive PRD generation
stories.description: Connect the WebSocket chat to the smith-replica interactive prompt loop so user input drives PRD creation.
acceptanceCriteria: When smith-replica is in interactive mode, it listens for chat messages via etcd or a proxy.
User chat messages are fed into the agent prompt.
Agent responses are streamed back to the WebSocket chat.
